title: 强制 Summary 的 worktreeDigest 绑定

sources.reason: R8 requires Summary evidence to bind to source state.

riskAssessment.reason: This changes only Summary evidence validation and its tests.

executionDecision.reason: Require source-bound verification evidence and cover the rejection path.

preReviewWarnings: Do not make finish-generated evidence impossible to validate.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Passed Contract v2 verification entries must include a valid 64-character worktreeDigest.
Missing or malformed worktreeDigest is rejected with a focused diagnostic.
Existing valid finish-generated evidence remains accepted.
Focused tests and full AI/project checks pass.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Summary validation currently treats worktreeDigest as optional, allowing hand-authored passed evidence without a source-state binding.
constraints: Do not change finish evidence generation in this Work Item.
intent.rationale: Every passed Contract v2 verification needs a source-state digest so reviewers can distinguish executed evidence from detached declarations.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: A passed verification without worktreeDigest is rejected.
A passed verification with a valid worktreeDigest remains accepted.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
